name: Avery Dennison Corp
business: Avery Dennison is a global leader in materials science and digital identification solutions, providing labeling and functional materials, RFID inlays and tags, and software applications that connect the physical and digital. It serves industries such as home and personal care, apparel, general retail, e-commerce, logistics, food and grocery, pharmaceuticals, and automotive. The company operates in more than 50 countries with over 200 manufacturing and distribution facilities.

exposures.sentence: We serve an array of industries worldwide, including home and personal care, apparel, general retail, e-commerce, logistics, food and grocery, pharmaceuticals and automotive.

catalysts.event: Opened first RFID inlay and label production site in India
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we opened our first RFID inlay and label production site in India.

catalysts.event: Acquired W.F. Taylor Holdings, Inc. (Taylor Adhesives)
catalysts.sentence: On October 20, 2025, we completed our business acquisition of W.F. Taylor Holdings, Inc. ("Taylor Adhesives"), a Georgia-based flooring adhesives business, for the purchase price of approximately $390 million.
